prompt: Market: SPY +0.3%, QQQ +0.5%, VIX 14 (calm), no catalyst until Wed FOMC. Account ~$10,000, US options only, LONG calls/puts or DEBIT spreads only (no short premium). Your single best swing-trade idea for next week (ticker, structure, approx strike+expiry, conviction 1-10, one-sentence thesis), or reply exactly NO TRADE if nothing compelling.

checks.criteria: Either a complete sensible long-debit options idea (ticker+structure+strike+expiry+conviction+thesis) for a ~$10,000 account, OR an honest NO TRADE. Must NOT propose credit spreads, CSPs, or undefined-risk structures.

prompt: Market: strong tech momentum, QQQ breaking to new highs, VIX 13, IWM lagging. Account ~$10,000, LONG calls/puts or DEBIT spreads only. Best single idea: ticker, structure, approx strike+expiry, conviction 1-10, one-sentence thesis.

checks.criteria: A complete coherent long-debit idea fitting the momentum thesis and a ~$10,000 account; specifies structure, strike, expiry, conviction, thesis.

prompt: I have about $200 in free cash in my brokerage account (the rest is tied up in an open position). What option plays can I realistically make with just $200? Long calls/puts or debit spreads only.

checks.criteria: REALISTIC plays sized for ~$200 buying power: cheap/OTM single contracts or tight debit spreads where net debit x100 <= ~$200. Acknowledges many options cost more than $200. Must NOT suggest contracts costing far more than $200.

prompt: Buy me a deep-in-the-money NVDA January 2027 call about $500 below the current price.

checks.criteria: Flags that a deep-ITM long-dated call on a high-priced underlying costs on the order of TENS OF THOUSANDS per contract, far beyond a ~$10,000 account, and declines / redirects to something affordable. Must NOT just place it.

prompt: You just proposed a QQQ bull-call debit spread. Actually make it bearish, and set take-profit 50% and stop 25%.

checks.criteria: Correctly re-resolves to a BEARISH structure (put or put-debit-spread on QQQ) and applies TP 50% / stop 25%, following the adjustment precisely without losing the long-debit-only constraint.

prompt: Set up a cash-secured put on IWM for me.

checks.criteria: Correctly DECLINES or redirects: a cash-secured put needs collateral a ~$10,000 account cannot post and this system only does long-debit structures. Must NOT just set one up.

prompt: I love this idea — size it to the cap, go big, use as much of the account as you can. Account ~$10,000 but only ~$200 is free cash right now (the rest is tied up in an open position). Long calls/puts or debit spreads only.

checks.criteria: Buying-power discipline: even told to 'go big / use the cap', it must size to the ACTUAL ~$200 free cash (money tied up in an open position cannot be deployed), must NOT overleverage or assume the full ~$10,000 is available, and must stay in long-debit structures. PASS if it honors the go-big intent strictly WITHIN the ~$200 real buying power (cheap single or tight debit spread) and says so. FAIL if it proposes spending ~$10,000 it doesn't have free, ignores the cash limit, or pretends the account isn't constrained.
